summary.finance: KOSPI rallies; Amazon invests $50B in OpenAI; Intel surges on manufacturing expansion.

market_highlights: Amazon (AMZN) commits $50B to OpenAI, focusing on Trainium chips and AWS integration.
Intel (INTC) surges ~9% on Fab 34 stake re-acquisition and strong 18A process momentum.
KOSPI rallies as Middle East de-escalation optimism continues.
South Korea's inclusion in WGBI strengthens the won.
art_highlights: BAMA 2026 opens at BEXCO, featuring 136 galleries and 4,000 works.
Theme: 'NODE: A Knot of Connection and Expansion'.
